case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. TIRSA MARILIN DIAZ VILLALOBOS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ VILLALOBOS, TIRSA MARILIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED AUG-13-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ VILLALOBOS, TIRSA MARILIN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAZ VILLALOBOS, TIRSA MARILIN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.
